dialogue_text: if ever you and Dejah Thoris escape the Tharks it will be upon this journey. We know that you will not go without her. You have shown yourself a mighty fighter, and we do not wish to manacle you, so we hold you both in the easiest way that will yet ensure security. I have spoken.

dialogue_text: This much, Tars Tarkas, you may do for me in return for the friendship that, I must confess, I feel for you.
